title: Motorcycle Canyon Jump
body: In $$1999$$, Robbie Knievel was the first to jump the Grand Canyon on a motorcycle. At a narrow part of the canyon $$(69.0$$ $$m$$ wide) and traveling $$35.8$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$ off the takeoff ramp, he reached the other side.
lesson: 4. Motion in Two and Three Dimensions
